headline: Billionaire Investor Just Revealed the AI Bet That Could Pay Off Big in 5 Years
summary: Billionaire investor Nikhil Kamath says shorting every AI company now could pay off big in 5 years. Here is his argument.

headline: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong Tells Founders to Solve 'Hard Problems,' Not Chase 'Base Hits'
summary: Coinbase Global Inc. CEO Brian Armstrong shared advice for entrepreneurs, saying founders should pursue difficult problems instead of choosing safer, less ambitious business ideas. Armstrong Urges Founders To Take On Hard Problems On Wednesday, Armstrong shared startup advice in a...

headline: Whale's Insight: Bitcoin's CPI Rally Is Fake, Built On Borrowed Money
summary: Trump enters the CLARITY fight, and the stablecoin map is reshaped by Stripe's PayPal bid and the OUSD threat, with Circle's pricing power shifting to distribution. Read more here.
